questions.question: Central provinces was created in which of the following years?
questions.explanation: Central provinces was created in the year 1861. It was created from Nagpur province and the Saugor and Nerbudda Territories. It was renamed central provinces in 1903.

questions.question: Lower Burma was annexed by Britishers in which of the following years?
questions.explanation: Lower Burma was annexed by Britishers in 1852. It was established as a province in 1962. Later Upper Burma was also incorporated in the year 1886.

questions.question: Assam province was separated from Bengal in which of the following years?
questions.explanation: Assam province was separated from Bengal in the year 1884. It was established as the North-Eastern Frontier non-regulation province. Later it was incorporated into the new province of Eastern Bengal and Assam in 1905.

questions.question: Andaman and Nicobar were established as a province in which of the following year?
questions.explanation: In the year 1858 the Britishers has established a colony at Port Blair. Andaman and Nicobar were established as a province in the year 1875.

questions.question: Baluchistan was organised in a province in which of the following years?
questions.explanation: Baluchistan was organised in a province in the year 1887. Now Baluchistan is one of the largest provinces of Pakistan in terms of area.
